selected_topic: Deadly “red Sky” Solar Storm from 800 Years Ago Discovered in Ancient Trees
news_angle: Scientists have uncovered evidence of a powerful solar storm from 800 years ago through ancient tree rings, revealing critical clues about the Sun’s past activity and space weather risks.
why_this_is_news: This discovery uncovers an extreme solar event that predates modern observations, highlighting the potential for rare but devastating space weather events that could impact Earth today.
specific_action: discovered by analysis of tree rings
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a daring cosmic detective unearthing forgotten solar secrets hidden in glowing ancient trees under a vivid red sky storm
image_prompt: dynamic, stylish anthropomorphic orange tabby cat with sharp markings and mischievous grin dressed as a streetwise cosmic detective, inspecting a giant ancient tree glowing with red aurora-like light under a dramatic, vivid scarlet solar storm sky, vibrant cinematic anime style, dynamic pose with oversized eyes shining with curiosity, urban mystical forest background, energetic and adventurous vibe

caption: Scientists uncovered a mighty solar storm from 800 years ago by probing ancient tree rings. Looks like even the Sun can throw a wild party—just hope it doesn't invite us next time!
